violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed aluminum foil on shelf by fryer. Foil is not considered smooth and cleanable.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed textured ceiling in food prep area. Textured sheetrock is not considered a smooth and cleanable surface.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
